human_role: The Rhythmic Speaker (Describes a calm scene using only sentences that match their resting heart rate).
ai_role: The Pulse Monitor (Evaluates the rhythmic consistency of the text).
human_expansion: Syncing internal physiological states with linguistic cadence.

human_role: The Impact Narrator (Describes a high-action event using only one-word or two-word sentences).
ai_role: The Momentum Analyst (Measures the 'impact force' of the truncated syntax).
human_expansion: Using brevity and percussion to convey urgency and force.

human_role: The Speed Reader (Describes a fast-moving object using extremely long, run-on sentences with no punctuation).
ai_role: The Velocity Sensor (Tracks how the lack of breath/pause mimics physical speed).
human_expansion: Mimicking physical velocity through grammatical flow.

human_role: The Resonance Expert (Builds a paragraph where every sentence must repeat at least one word from the previous one).
ai_role: The Loop Detector (Identifies the 'semantic echoes' created by the repetition).
human_expansion: Creating linguistic patterns through intentional lexical repetition.

human_role: The Silence Strategist (Places '...' in a dialogue to shift the power dynamic or meaning).
ai_role: The Subtext Infiner (Predicts what was left unsaid during each specific pause).
human_expansion: Mastering the 'music' of the unspoken gap in communication.

human_role: The Poetic Prover (Explains a logical fact using internal rhyme to make it sound more 'true').
ai_role: The Phonetical Analyst (Detects the 'Keats Heuristic'—the tendency to believe beautiful statements).
human_expansion: Understanding how phonology influences the perception of truth.

human_role: The Second-Hand Narrator (Tells a story where each sentence must represent exactly 5 seconds of real-time).
ai_role: The Temporal Auditor (Flags sentences that compress or dilate time too much).
human_expansion: Internalizing the relationship between narrative pace and actual time.

human_role: The Accent Shifter (Writes the same sentence three times, indicating a different word for emphasis each time).
ai_role: The Intent Decoder (Explains how the three different stresses change the social meaning).
human_expansion: Isolating the role of prosody in semantic meaning.

human_role: The Counterpoint Speaker (Offers an argument while maintaining a secondary, rhythmic sub-narrative).
ai_role: The Frequency Analyzer (Separates the 'signal' of the argument from the 'noise' of the rhythm).
human_expansion: Managing multiple layers of rhythmic and conceptual data simultaneously.

human_role: The Oxygen Controller (Describes an underwater scene using sentences that get shorter as their 'breath' runs out).
ai_role: The Deprivation Monitor (Predicts the psychological state of the narrator based on sentence decay).
human_expansion: Mapping physical limitations (breath) to syntactic structure.

human_role: The Circular Rhythmist (Starts and ends a paragraph with the same rhythmic pattern, but different words).
ai_role: The Structural Verifier (Confirms the rhythmic identity of the beginning and end).
human_expansion: Recognizing structural patterns independent of lexical content.

human_role: The Slow-Motion Narrator (Describes a 1-second event—like a blink—in 500 words).
ai_role: The Micro-Detail Extractor (Identifies the sensory layers revealed by the dilation).
human_expansion: Expanding the 'resolution' of temporal perception through exhaustive description.
